creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #4)

RPi4B BOT with 4 GiBytes of RAM: booted just fine.

For reference:

root@generic:~ # uname -apKU
FreeBSD generic 14.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE releng/14.1-n267679-10e31f0946d8 GENERIC arm64 aarch64 1401000 1401000

As for earlier stages of booting (extracted from log file content):

. . .
RPi: BOOTLOADER release VERSION:e608a69d DATE: 2024/04/15 TIME: 14:12:14
BOOTMODE: 0x06 partition 0 build-ts BUILD_TIMESTAMP=1713186734 serial 897c4fff boardrev c03111 stc 375422
. . .

So the EEPROM content is recent.

NOTE: c03111 means a RPi4B rev 1.1 : about as old as it gets.

Also:

. . .
U-Boot 2024.01 (May 31 2024 - 07:02:58 +0000)

DRAM:  948 MiB (effective 3.9 GiB)
RPI 4 Model B (0xc03111)
. . .

And:

. . .
